div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 750px; height: 1px; padding-top: 567px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 116px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Time-Cycle Loop (repeats each tick)
1. Car(s) arrive → WaitQueue.enqueue(car)
2. WaitQueue.notify_observers(tick) → ParkingEngine.on_time_cycle(tick)
3. ParkingEngine calls IParkingAlgorithm.find_space() for each queued car
4. ParkingEngine unparks cars whose expiry_tick <= current tick
5. FeeCollector.record_parking() accumulates fee = car_size x wait_time
6. IReporter.report(SimulationStats) → ConsoleReporter or QtDashboardReporter

div.div:
SOLID Mapping
S — Car, ParkingSpace, FeeCollector, Garage each own one concern
O — New algorithms added via IParkingAlgorithm; ParkingEngine unchanged
L — FIFOAlgorithm / BestFitAlgorithm are substitutable implementations
I — ITimeCycleObserver, IReporter, IUserInterface keep contracts narrow
D — ParkingEngine depends on IParkingAlgorithm & IReporter abstractions

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
